message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

interface IVersionedMonoBehaviourInternal {
  UpgradeFromUnityThread() : void
}

class MonoBehaviour

class ISerializationCallbackReceiver

abstract class VersionedMonoBehaviour {
  version : int = 0
  --
  «virtual» Awake() : void
  «virtual» Reset() : void
  OnBeforeSerialize() : void
  OnAfterDeserialize() : void
  «virtual» OnUpgradeSerializedData(version:int, unityThread:bool) : int
  UpgradeFromUnityThread() : void
}

VersionedMonoBehaviour ..|> IVersionedMonoBehaviourInternal
VersionedMonoBehaviour --|> MonoBehaviour
VersionedMonoBehaviour --|> ISerializationCallbackReceiver
@enduml
